steps.title: Use the interior test
steps.content:
For the circle $(x+3)^2+(y-1)^2=25$, a point is inside the circle when its substituted value is less than $25$.
$$(x+3)^2+(y-1)^2\lt 25$$

steps.title: Test the outside point
steps.content:
For point $(3,2)$, substitute the coordinates into the left side.
$$(3+3)^2+(2-1)^2=36+1=37$$
Since $37\gt25$, this point is not in the interior. The answer is D.
